One finding, fixed and closed:

**`/mnt/data/commons-server/src/audition.ts`** — two `fetch()` calls were missing `AbortSignal.timeout()`:
- Line 66: Anthropic API call in `callClaude()` (walker persona generation) — now has 30s timeout
- Line 352: Discord inject call in `notifyDiscord()` — now has 8s timeout

Both could hang indefinitely if the upstream service was slow or unresponsive, blocking the audition pipeline.

Fixed in commit `9b513b6`, pushed, GitHub issue #5 opened and closed.
